introSection: Monkey Mayhem is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently located at West Midland Safari Park in Bewdley, Worcestershire, England, UK. It was previously known as Wall's Twister Ride between 1998 and 2019.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Green track with yellow supports, used to have red track and green supports.

fullText:
Monkey Mayhem is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently located at West Midland Safari Park in Bewdley, Worcestershire, England, UK. It was previously known as Wall's Twister Ride between 1998 and 2019.



Green track with yellow supports, used to have red track and green supports.
